dataset_name: IBDMDB / iHMP IBD Multi-omics
study_name: IBDMDB / iHMP IBD Multi-omics
repository_type: Multi-omics portal; public archive; controlled-access archive
publication_title: Multi-omics of the gut microbial ecosystem in inflammatory bowel diseases
omics_layer: Multi-omics; Bulk transcriptomics; Metagenomics; Metatranscriptomics; Metabolomics; Metaproteomics; Virome
sample_size_samples: 2,965 specimens across stool, biopsy, and blood components
potential_use_cases: Host-microbiome integration; longitudinal disease activity; integrative multi-omics; treatment response; remission prediction
limitations: Complex multi-omics structure; mixed access levels; harmonization required across modalities; visit-level completeness varies across participants
data_access_status: Public processed data; Controlled access (some components)
notes: Core HMP2 (Human Microbiome Project Phase 2) study. Includes host transcriptomics, metagenomics, metatranscriptomics, proteomics, metabolomics, and virome components. Some raw data components require dbGaP approval (phs001559).
verification_notes: Verified portal, GEO, BioProject, dbGaP index, and Nature publication. Corrected dbGaP accession from phs001559 to phs001626.v1.p1 and population from Adult to mixed adult/pediatric. Still not marked analysis-ready because modality-specific completeness varies.
overlap_notes: IBDMDB/iHMP/HMP2 longitudinal multi-omics parent row. Count once at cohort level only; do not count modality accessions, portal records, dbGaP, GEO, BioProject/SRA, or IBDMDB portal components as separate cohorts. Public sources describe 132 subjects followed for one year with 2,965 stool, biopsy, and blood specimens and multiple assay layers. GEO GSE111889 is the host transcriptomics component; dbGaP phs001626.v1.p1 and BioProject PRJNA398089 describe the broader IBDMDB/HMP2 resource.
